message:
fix(test): use ScopedThemeLock in demo showcase tests for deterministic rendering

Update all tests that depend on theme state to use ScopedThemeLock,
ensuring they hold exclusive access to the global theme for the duration
of their rendering operations.

Files updated:
- src/theme.rs: Add ScopedRenderLock combining theme + a11y locking,
  fix parameter shadowing in ScopedA11yLock::new(), update WCAG contrast
  tests to use ScopedThemeLock instead of raw set_theme() calls
- src/screens/layout_lab.rs: Pin theme in prop_render_deterministic proptest
  to CyberpunkAurora before each checksum computation
- src/screens/theme_studio.rs: Use ScopedThemeLock in ctrl_t_cycles_theme test
- tests/a11y_snapshots.rs: Update a11y panel tests to use ScopedThemeLock
  for proper isolation in parallel test execution
- tests/screen_snapshots.rs: Add ScopedThemeLock import for theme-dependent
  snapshot tests

These changes work together with the core theme locking mechanism in
ftui-extras to ensure that:
1. Tests that read theme state hold the lock during rendering
2. Tests that modify theme state serialize with other tests
3. The prop_render_deterministic proptest produces stable checksums

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
